Document:
# Nullrod Forms Nullrods can be transformed to unique forms by using them on an altar.
## Altar replacement Altars can be set to fit your desired look by applying a required item to the base altar, you can remove the applied item to return the altar to base form using a crowbar. WARNING: Nullrod transformation is a non-reversible process, so choose wisely.
## Nullrod Old reliable, the nullrod you will arrive on station with. Typically changed out from instantly due to having no special ability, but using it is a real flex of how robust you are.
## Arrythmic Knife Provides the user with a randomized movespeed boost periodically. Could help you chase down an unholy enemy, but could also slow you to a crawl while you try to escape.
## Bulwark Stand as the lord protector. A truely powerful shield capable of blocking all hostile attacks when positioned on a tile. Additonally can be used to dash a short distance periodically, which will knockback and harm anyone hit along the way.
## Casul and Jackal A pair of holy pistols and a snazzy belt to store them in. Can only be fired together. Pray to reload.
## Faith A dinky pistol that heals people with bullets, don't ask. Applies holy damage to unholy enemies with the same bullets. Pray to reload.
## God Hand God's blessing to his most trusted chaplain. Applies fire and holyfire stacks on attack. Has the same pry ability as a crowbar. Unremovable.
## Grey Emperor's Glove Lead the tider's to gods light. An unremovable insulated hand with most every tool you would require to lead the greytide. Use item in-hand to cycle through tool selection.
## Honkmother's Maw HONK! A huge clown mask imbued with the power of the honkmother. Knocks down on hit. Don't be surprised if the clown steals this from you.
## Holy Chainsaw An unremovable chainsaw. Must be wielded to attack. I mean, it's a chainsaw that does holy damage.
## Holy Claywmore DEUS VULT! Can fire a marking projectile, which upon being attacked will heal brute, asphyxiation and blododloss of the wielder.
## Iradomini A powerful crossbow, must be weilded to fire. Fires a single VERY powerful holy arrow, which will disappear after a minute. Takes a long time to reload via prayer, position wisely.
## Monk Staff In simple terms? A big stick. Launch a flurry of attacks to deal stamina damage on hit, very useful for chasing down the unholy.
## Ratvarian Spear Oh? Prefer the old gods? Well heres the nullrod for you. A one-handed spear imbued with the power of ratvar. Can store more chemicals than usual spears, and applies a large amount of holy damage when thrown.
## Rosary Support Mains rejoice. Area of Effect heal on pray, but also harms the unholy who are also nearby.
